Home / Services / Ornamental Metal Fence Installation

Ornamental Metal Fence Installation

Elegant ornamental metal fences that add beauty and security to your property.

Ornamental metal fences offer a sophisticated and elegant look while providing security and boundary definition for your Kansas City home. We specialize in installing high-quality ornamental metal fences that enhance your property's curb appeal and provide lasting value. Our team works with a variety of styles and materials, including wrought iron and aluminum, to create custom fence designs that complement your home's architecture. We handle every aspect of the installation process, from site preparation to post setting and final finishing, ensuring a seamless and professional result. Whether you're looking to enhance your garden, secure your pool, or add a touch of elegance to your property, we can create an ornamental metal fence that meets your needs. Choose Residential Fence KC for exceptional craftsmanship and attention to detail.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design consultation and material selection
  2. 02 Step 2: Site preparation and layout
  3. 03 Step 3: Post installation and concrete setting
  4. 04 Step 4: Panel and gate installation

Benefits

  • Enhanced curb appeal
  • Increased property value
  • Security and boundary definition
  • Customizable designs

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between wrought iron and aluminum fences?

Wrought iron is a heavier and stronger material, while aluminum is lighter and more resistant to rust. Both offer a beautiful and durable fencing option.

Can I customize the design of my ornamental metal fence?

Yes, we offer a wide range of customization options, including different styles, colors, and decorative elements.

How much does an ornamental metal fence cost?

The cost of an ornamental metal fence depends on the material, style, and size. We provide free estimates to help you plan your project.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ornamental metal fence installation? Contact us today.
